sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_bitmaps (id UInt32, bitmap_data Bitmap) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_bitmaps VALUES (1, bitmapBuild([1, 2, 3])), (2, bitmapBuild([3, 4, 5]));
SELECT bitmapToArray(bitmapAndnot(bitmap_data, bitmapBuild([3, 4]))) FROM test_bitmaps WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_bitmaps SET bitmap_data = bitmapAndnot(bitmap_data, bitmapBuild([2])) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, bitmapToArray(bitmapAndnot(bitmap_data, (SELECT bitmapBuild([4, 5]) FROM test_bitmaps WHERE id = 2))) AS result FROM test_bitmaps;
